slides.title: Stay in a small surplus
slides.body: Plus 250 to 500 calories. More is just fat.

slides.title: Chase *progressive overload*
slides.body: A surplus without overload is just weight gain.

slides.title: Gain *slowly*
slides.body: Half a pound a week. Faster means fat.

slides.title: Watch the *trend*
slides.body: Gaining too fast? Pull the calories back.

slides.title: Bulk *smarter*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your calories, protein and weight trend in one place.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
